request.system:
你是一个用于 PDF 原位回填的精修助手。
你处理的是已经翻译过、但版面过紧的文本块。
你的目标不是重写内容，而是在尽量不损失信息和正式风格的前提下，做最小必要压缩。
只返回 JSON，不要输出任何解释。

文档场景：上市公司年度报告翻译与逐页版面回填
目标风格：正式、审慎、可披露、接近已发布英文年报

动态文档背景：
- 章节线索：我們的目標 | 目錄 | 友邦保險一覽 | 2020 年里程碑 | 概覽 | 2020年業績一覽(1) | 2020年按市場分部劃分 | 主席報告 | 集團首席執行官兼總裁報告 | 財務及營運回顧
- 导航线索：概覽 | 財務及營運回顧 | 企業管治 | 其他資料 | 財務報表
- 高频术语：友邦保險 -> AIA | 新業務價值 -> new business value | 稅後營運溢利 -> operating profit after tax | 內涵價值 -> embedded value | 有效保單組合 -> in-force portfolio | 代理渠道 -> agency channel | 夥伴分銷 -> partnership distribution | 銀行保險 -> bancassurance | 中國內地 -> Mainland China | 中國台灣 -> Taiwan | 新加坡 -> Singapore | 泰國 -> Thailand
- 这是上市公司年度报告语境，译文要保持年报/财报正式书面表达，不使用口语化或营销化措辞。
- 文档包含财务表格、比率和金额，数字、百分比、币种、年份及缩写必须严格保留。
- 文档包含目录或侧边导航，导航项宜使用固定、稳定、可复用的正式译法。
- 文档存在大量章节标题，标题应优先贴近正式已发布年报的写法，并尽量避免不必要换行。

受保护信息：
- 数字
- 百分比
- 货币
- 年份
- 日期
- 专有名词
- 公司名
- 人名
- 地名
- 图表微标签
- 页码

硬约束：
- 只做最小幅度缩短，不要摘要化，不要改成分析师速记风格。
- 不要随意缩写正式标题、栏目名、导航项、图表标签、页眉页脚。
- 如果原文是完整句，优先保持完整句。
- block_id 必须原样保留。
- 返回格式：{"translations": [{"block_id": "...", "translation": "..."}]}

messages.content:
以下文本块版面过紧。请在不改变核心含义和正式风格的前提下，仅做最小必要压缩。
不要摘要，不要解释，只输出严格 JSON。
{
  "page_no": 16,
  "source_language": "Traditional Chinese",
  "target_language": "English",
  "problem_blocks": [
    {
      "block_id": "p16_b3",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "我們瞭解我們在這重要領域仍然任重道遠。我們最近亦完成環境、社會及管治策略的檢討。本人充滿信心，我們",
      "current_translation": "We recognise that we still have much to do in this important area. We have also recently completed a review of our Environmental, Social and Governance strategy. I am confident that our",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.581,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,

        527.08,
        106.65

    },

      "block_id": "p16_b4",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "的五大策略焦點領域：提升身心健康、綠色營運、可持續投資、人才與文化和有效的管治，將有助我們實現在環",
      "current_translation": "five strategic focus areas: enhancing physical and mental wellbeing, green operations, sustainable investment, talent and culture, and effective governance, will help us achieve our aspiration to be a",

      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.577,
      "line_count": 1,

      "current_translation": "global leader in Environmental, Social and Governance.",

        187.26

      "font_size_avg": 14.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p16_b7",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "在2020年，2019冠狀病毒病大流行無疑是我們生活記憶中最大規模的公共衞生緊急狀態。受影響的企業和家庭",
      "current_translation": "In 2020, the COVID-19 pandemic was undoubtedly the largest-scale public health emergency in our living memory. Affected businesses and households",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.72,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 52,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        206.69,
        527.31,
        218.65
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p16_b8",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "獲得前所未見的公共財政和金融支援，有助緩解由疫情大流行造成的部分極端金融衝擊，並加快復甦步伐，這在",
      "current_translation": "received unprecedented public financial and monetary support, which helped mitigate some of the extreme financial impacts caused by the pandemic and accelerated the pace of recovery, which was particularly evident in",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.517,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        222.7,
        527.12,
        234.65
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p16_b9",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "具備完善衞生政策及基建的國家尤其可見。然而，各國之間存在顯著差異，在這困境下，亞洲（日本除外）地區",
      "current_translation": "countries with well-developed health policies and infrastructure. However, there were significant differences between countries, and in these challenging circumstances, Asia (excluding Japan) recorded",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.568,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        238.7,
        527.27,
        250.65
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p16_b10",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "錄得全球相對最強勁的國內生產總值表現。現時，環球經濟正剛剛開始擺脫一場深度衰退，並步入好轉的初步階",
      "current_translation": "the relatively strongest gross domestic product performance globally. Currently, the global economy is just beginning to emerge from a deep recession and is entering the early stages of improvement.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.572,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        254.7,
        527.12,
        266.65
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {

      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "段。",
      "current_translation": "Section.",
      "translation_source": "model_repair_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.556,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 2,
      "bbox": [

      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p16_b12",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "儘管疫情大流行的影響依然沒有結束，但相信2021年將是過渡性的一年，我們對此保持審慎樂觀。市場憧憬推出",
      "current_translation": "Although the effects of the pandemic have not yet ended, we believe 2021 will be a transitional year and we remain cautiously optimistic. Markets anticipate the rollout of",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.677,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        302.71,
        527.23,
        314.66
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p16_b13",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "疫苗接種計劃和新療法有助降低疫症的感染率和嚴重性，使醫療系統能更有效應對疫情，並降低死亡率。儘管我",
      "current_translation": "vaccination programmes and new therapies to help reduce infection rates and severity of the disease, enabling healthcare systems to respond more effectively to the pandemic and reduce mortality rates. Although we",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.528,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        318.71,
        527.12,
        330.66
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p16_b14",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "們並不預計外出或消費行為於短期內能回復疫情大流行前的水平，但隨著消費者信心恢復，預期復甦範疇將逐步",
      "current_translation": "do not expect consumer behaviour and spending patterns to return to pre-pandemic levels in the short term, as consumer confidence recovers, the scope of recovery is expected to gradually",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.602,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        334.71,
        527.16,
        346.66
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p16_b15",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "由製造主導的產業擴展到消費和服務業。這在人口較年輕的國家將尤其可見。",
      "current_translation": "expand from manufacturing-led industries to consumer and service sectors. This will be particularly evident in countries with younger populations.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.543,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 34,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        350.71,
        387.13,
        362.66
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p16_b16",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "我對友邦保險的長遠未來前景充滿信心。儘管面對短期不明朗因素，但帶動需求的本土因素強勁，加上亞洲的主",
      "current_translation": "I am confident about AIA's long-term prospects. Despite near-term uncertainties, the domestic factors driving demand remain strong, and with Asia's key",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.721,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,

        527.12,
        394.67

      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p16_b17",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "要人口結構趨勢，仍為友邦保險業務的長遠前景提供正面的結構性支持。在大眾收入增加、私人保險滲透率偏",
      "current_translation": "demographic trends, there continues to be positive structural support for AIA's long-term business prospects. With rising incomes, low private insurance penetration, and",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",

      "current_font_ratio": 0.649,

      "char_count": 48,
      "bbox": [

      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "低，以及社會福利覆蓋有限的情況下，市場對友邦保險產品的需求將繼續增長。我們將憑藉龐大的競爭優勢和強",
      "current_translation": "limited social welfare coverage, demand for AIA's products will continue to grow. We will leverage our substantial competitive advantages and strong",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.768,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [

      "source_text": "勁的增長往績，為社區創建更可持續的未來，並為所有持分者創造共享價值。",
      "current_translation": "track record of growth to build a more sustainable future for our communities and create shared value for all stakeholders.",
